---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="px-4 py-5 my-4 text-center bg-dark text-white rounded-3">
  <p class="fs-6 fw-semibold text-uppercase tracking-wide mb-2" style="letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#adb5bd;">
    Online Appendices &nbsp;·&nbsp; Springer 2026
  </p>
  <h1 class="display-5 fw-bold mb-3">
    Portfolio Construction<br>and Risk Analysis
  </h1>
  <p class="col-lg-7 mx-auto lead mb-4" style="color:#ced4da;">
    A rigorous treatment of quantitative methods for investment management —
    from classical portfolio theory to modern statistical methodology.
  </p>
  <p class="mb-0" style="color:#adb5bd; font-size:0.95rem;">
    R. Douglas Martin &ensp;&middot;&ensp;
    Thomas K. Philips &ensp;&middot;&ensp;
    Bernd Scherer &ensp;&middot;&ensp;
    Kirk Li
  </p>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-important appearance="minimal"}
**Copyright Notice.** Material on this site is planned for publication in 2026 by R. Douglas Martin, Thomas K. Philips, Bernd Scherer, and Kirk Li. All rights reserved. © Copyright 2025.
:::

## About the Book

*Portfolio Construction and Risk Analysis* (PCRA) provides a comprehensive and rigorous treatment of the quantitative foundations of modern investment management. The book develops the mathematical, statistical, and computational tools needed to construct, evaluate, and risk-manage portfolios in a principled way.

The text integrates classical theory — mean-variance optimization, the Capital Asset Pricing Model, the Arbitrage Pricing Theory — with modern statistical methodology including robust estimation, regularized regression, and machine learning.

## Online Appendices

This site hosts the five technical appendices to PCRA. Each appendix provides self-contained background material with inline figures and a full PDF download.

```{=html}
<div class="row g-4 mt-1">

  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small fw-bold text-uppercase mb-1" style="letter-spacing:0.08em;">Appendix A</p>
        <h5 class="card-title">Mathematical Tools</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Vectors, matrix algebra, eigendecompositions, convex analysis, and constrained optimization.</p>
        <p class="mb-0"><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">Linear Algebra</span><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">SVD</span><span class="badge bg-secondary">Optimization</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer bg-transparent border-top-0">
        <a href="appendix-a.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read &rarr;</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small fw-bold text-uppercase mb-1" style="letter-spacing:0.08em;">Appendix B</p>
        <h5 class="card-title">Probability &amp; Statistics</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Location-scale distributions, OLS/WLS/GLS, MLE, asymptotic theory, and the delta method.</p>
        <p class="mb-0"><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">Least Squares</span><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">MLE</span><span class="badge bg-secondary">CLT</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer bg-transparent border-top-0">
        <a href="appendix-b.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read &rarr;</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small fw-bold text-uppercase mb-1" style="letter-spacing:0.08em;">Appendix C</p>
        <h5 class="card-title">Utility Theory</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">VNM axioms, concave utility, risk aversion, certainty equivalents, and the link to MVO.</p>
        <p class="mb-0"><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">CARA/CRRA</span><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">EUM</span><span class="badge bg-secondary">Risk Aversion</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer bg-transparent border-top-0">
        <a href="appendix-c.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read &rarr;</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small fw-bold text-uppercase mb-1" style="letter-spacing:0.08em;">Appendix D</p>
        <h5 class="card-title">Portfolio Theory</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Efficient frontier math, CAPM and APT proofs, zero-beta portfolios, robust estimation.</p>
        <p class="mb-0"><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">CAPM</span><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">APT</span><span class="badge bg-secondary">Zero-Beta</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer bg-transparent border-top-0">
        <a href="appendix-d.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read &rarr;</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small fw-bold text-uppercase mb-1" style="letter-spacing:0.08em;">Appendix E</p>
        <h5 class="card-title">Machine Learning</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net, cross-validation, robust ML, logistic regression, projection pursuit.</p>
        <p class="mb-0"><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">Regularization</span><span class="badge bg-secondary me-1">Robust ML</span><span class="badge bg-secondary">PPR</span></p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer bg-transparent border-top-0">
        <a href="appendix-e.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read &rarr;</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Citation

> Martin, R. D., Philips, T. K., Scherer, B., and Li, K. (2026). *Portfolio Construction and Risk Analysis*. Springer. (In press.)
